description: A clean, minimalist designed text graphic on a near-white (cream) background, landscape orientation. There is no photo, illustration, or person -- it is a pure typography card. A bold black serif headline reads 'Our Mission' at top left, with the words highlighted in a soft yellow/gold marker-style block behind the text. Below, a multi-line serif body paragraph (also set on yellow highlight blocks running the width of each line) reads: 'To foster, promote, and develop the welfare of the wage earners, job seekers, and retirees of the United States; improve working conditions; advance opportunities for profitable employment; and assure work-related benefits and rights.' The bottom-right corner carries the wordmark 'dol.gov' in bold black. The design technique is a quote-card / highlighter aesthetic emphasizing the agency's statutory mission statement. Posted right around the Jan 2025 transition; messaging is institutional self-definition aimed at the general public and DOL clientele -- positioning the Department of Labor as a worker-welfare agency. Restrained, official styling rather than a punchy 'meme,' but it is a deliberately designed slogan graphic.
notable_text: Our Mission / To foster, promote, and develop the welfare of the wage earners, job seekers, and retirees of the United States; improve working conditions; advance opportunities for profitable employment; and assure work-related benefits and rights. / dol.gov
